title: NAM Kerala Yoga Instructor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
short_info: National AYUSH Mission Kerala (NAM Kerala) Yoga Instructor Notification 2026 has been released on 20 May 2026 on the official website nam.kerala.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NAM Kerala Yoga Instructor Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: BNYS/BAMS, MSc (Yoga), MPhil (Yoga), PG Diploma in Yoga, Certificate in Yoga from YCB/SCOLE Kerala, PhD in Yoga
qualification.details: BNYS/BAMS from a recognized university OR MSc (Yoga)/MPhil (Yoga)/PG Diploma in Yoga from a recognized university OR Certificate in Yoga from recognized institutions like YCB/SCOLE Kerala OR PhD in Yoga

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: http://nam.kerala.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NAM Kerala Yoga Instructor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the NAM Kerala Yoga Instructor position is 03 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Yoga Instructor post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Yoga Instructor post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 14,000 per month.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Yoga Instructor role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a BNYS/BAMS degree, or MSc/MPhil/PG Diploma in Yoga, or a Certificate in Yoga from recognized institutions, or a PhD in Yoga.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Yoga Instructor position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying to the Yoga Instructor post is 50 years.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the NAM Kerala Yoga Instructor job?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Yoga Instructor post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Yoga Instructor position will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies for the Yoga Instructor post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Yoga Instructor post announced under this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of National AYUSH Mission Kerala, which is http://nam.kerala.gov.in.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job as per the information provided in the notification.
